hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; PBXPROJ="FlappyButtdog.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj"; [ -f "$PBXPROJ" ] || exit 0; current=$(grep -m1 'CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION' "$PBXPROJ" | grep -o '[0-9]*;' | tr -d ';'); next=$((current + 1)); sed -i "s/CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION = $current;/CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION = $next;/g" "$PBXPROJ"; git add "$PBXPROJ"; echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Build number bumped $current → $next\"}"
